# Paste-vlv v1.1.1

## Highlights

- Select every item in the current history or pinboard with `Cmd-A` and remove the selection with `Forward Delete`.
- Give clipboard items custom titles from their contextual menu or by double-clicking their title; press `Return` to save.
- Preserve custom titles in grouped-text backup exports and imports. New exports use schema v3 while imports remain compatible with schema v2.

## Distribution

- macOS 13 or later.
- ZIP is ad-hoc signed, not Developer ID signed or notarized. macOS may show a Gatekeeper warning on first launch.
